title: Rain Delay
description: Allows editing the number of ticks of clear weather after rain/thunder and the number of ticks that rain/thunder will last.
body:
Do you feel like it rains nearly every day, even after sleeping it away?

This mod provides configurable settings for rain and thunder while keeping the **vanilla rain logic**.

You can customize:
- Rain Delay (minimum and maximum ticks after rain naturally ends before another rain)
- Thunder Delay (minimum and maximum ticks after thunder naturally ends before another thunder)
- Rain Duration (minimum and maximum ticks for rain duration)
- Thunder Duration (minimum and maximum ticks for thunder duration)

The default config values change the rain and thunder delay from 0.5-7.5 days to 4-11 days, while leaving the rain and thunder durations alone.
